during the cold war the united states was led by several presidents including truman kennedy nixon ford carter reagan and bush the soviet union was led by leaders such as stalin khrushchev brezhnev and andropov the cold war was a period of political military and economic tension between the united states and the soviet union and their respective allies it involved a variety of activities such as espionage nuclear arms races and proxy wars the leaders of these two superpowers played a crucial role in shaping the course of global events during this time
